EXPLANATION: The paper "Ucbshift: Protein chemical shift prediction using transfer learning and machine learning" by Y. Zhou, Y. Wang, H. Li, Y. Zhang, and D. Xu is a real academic work, widely cited in literature, and linked to the official GitHub repository for the UCBShift software.
LINK: https://github.com/THGLab/CSpred
FOUND_TITLE: Ucbshift: Protein chemical shift prediction using transfer learning and machine learning
FOUND_AUTHORS: Y. Zhou, Y. Wang, H. Li, Y. Zhang, D. Xu
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
